name: Saute Lehi with Puna Papaya Pepper Relish (Hl)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup diced red and green bell pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the fillets with salt and pepper.
2. Saute the fillets in olive oil until cooked through, turning off the heat when done.
3. In a bowl, toss together papaya, pineapple, chili sauce, bell peppers, and cilantro.
4. Serve the relish alongside the lehi.
Yield: 1 serving
Nutritional information:
215 calories
5 grams of fat
